per_question.question_text: Can you explain the difference between a LEFT JOIN and an INNER JOIN in SQL, and give me a simple business scenario where you'd choose one over the other?
per_question.answer_text: तो तो जो inner join है वो सिर्फ return करता है records। Data Matching Values in Voters और जो left sign है That returns all records from the left Left Table and the matching records from the right table. If there is no match then R return For the right table column. तो जो business scenario है वो है marketing teams often use Left Joins to identify inactive customers for re-engagement campaigns.

per_question.question_text: Your resume mentions your work at KAS Marine contributed to a 5% improvement in fuel efficiency recommendations. Can you walk me through exactly how you analyzed the vessel performance data and what specific trend you found that led to this recommendation?
per_question.answer_text: हाँ हां तो मेरे interns के ही time पे। I analyze vessel operational data. Including voyage duration, speed, fuel consumption and route details. I first clean the data cells by removing to be get sandaling missing values and standardizing units. Power BI और Excel का use करके। उसके बाद I created dashboard to analyze fuel consumption across roots and vessel types. I discovered that certain vessels operating above a Optimal speed Consistently consume disproportionality की Higher Fuel. By highlighting this trend and recommending maintaining speed With an optimal range द टीम वाज़ एबल टू इम्प्रूव फ्यूल एफिशिएंसी बाय एप्रोक्सीमेटली 5%।

per_question.question_text: In Excel, what's the purpose of a Pivot Table, and can you walk me through the basic steps to create one from a raw dataset?
per_question.answer_text: Yes अ Picture तो pivot table है वो help करता है summarize, analyze and explore large data sets quickly. हाँ। Without writing formulas. इसका example है If I have sales data containing date product Bacteria and Revenue. I can instantly see total sales by region or monthly trades. तो इसके simple जो steps हैं इसको create कर सकते सकते हैं वो है Select data set, go to insert, pivot tables, choose the data range and location. Drag fields into row, columns, values, filters. Customize aggregation such as Count और Average। This allows quick Quick Business Analyze with Minimal Efforts.

The job description mentions SQL subqueries. Can you describe a situation where using a subquery would be more effective than using a JOIN?
